metadata.purpose: Expected outcomes for E2E Tally to Review Queue testing
metadata.pass_rule: A test passes when the webhook accepts/rejects with the expected status and the classification/review posture matches the expected tier/risk/manual-review direction. Exact score values may vary while scoring logic is tuned.

expected_results.expected_log_policy: log case_id/status/request_id only; do not log raw payload or real PII
expected_results.operator_gate: manual review required before activation or outreach
